creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Maintainer of www/codeigniter or other interested party,

CodeIgniter 2.X is EOL as of 31 October 2015.
https://github.com/bcit-ci/CodeIgniter/tree/2.2-stable

One of two actions are required: 
- Either this PR requires marking the port DEPRECATED.
- Update www/codeigniter to 3.0.x

If updating,
- The 3.x branch is under the MIT license
https://github.com/bcit-ci/CodeIgniter/blob/3.0-stable/license.txt
- The port should be changed to use OPTIONS helpers.
